prompt:
A high-fashion surrealist advertising poster for Nike. The scene is set in a minimalist, monochrome light blue studio with a semi-reflective floor. 
The central focus is an oversized, giant white Croc clog positioned on its heel at a diagonal angle, serving as a backrest. A male fashion model with dark hair, dressed in a clean, all-white coordinated sweatshirt and wide-leg trousers, leans his entire back against the giant shoe in a relaxed, leaning posture. he is facing right in profile, looking ahead with a serene expression, and wearing standard-sized white Clog.
In the background, the word "NIKE" is written in massive, bold, white condensed sans-serif typography, partially occluded by the giant shoe and the model to create a sense of depth. At the top right, "Designed By Shmus" 
At the bottom center, a white sans-serif tagline reads: {argument name="tagline" default=""wear for comfort, worn for confidence. Because life feels better when your feet stop complaining.""} The lighting is soft, cool, and even, casting gentle shadows and a soft reflection of the subjects on the glossy blue floor. The overall aesthetic is clean, modern, and high-concept.

Make the aspect ratio 3:4
